summary: First-iteration E2E test of AI Career Mentor MVP. 15/15 backend pytest cases passed (health, auth, onboarding+roadmap, today's tasks, task complete idempotency, quiz generate/submit (correct_index not leaked), full 4-turn interview + AI evaluation, mentor review, dashboard). Full frontend Playwright flow also passed end-to-end with a seeded session cookie: landing -> onboarding submit -> dashboard (readiness+streak cards) -> tasks (4 cards, complete first with visual line-through) -> quiz (5 Qs, submit, score shown) -> interview (start, 4 replies, status auto-completes, evaluate card with score+strengths/weaknesses) -> mentor (readiness 18/100, strong/weak/recommended_focus rendered). All AI agents (Gemini 3 Flash for roadmap/tasks/quiz, GPT-5.2 for interview/evaluator/mentor) returned valid JSON parsed correctly.

minor.issue: _today_key() uses server-local date.today() (no tz) — could roll over inconsistently for users in non-UTC timezones.
No server-side length validation on `background` (frontend enforces >=10 chars only).
If client sends fewer answers than questions, missing slots are silently scored as -1 (incorrect) without an explicit error — acceptable but undocumented.

issues: The hero CTA 'Start with Google' button text appears slightly muted/low-contrast against the cream hero background — minor; the top-right 'Sign in with Google' is clearer.

action_items: (Optional) Add Pydantic length validators (min_length on background/target_role) in OnboardingInput.
(Optional) Make _today_key timezone-aware (use UTC or accept tz from client/profile).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~600 lines and growing — consider splitting into routers (auth, onboarding, tasks, quiz, interview, mentor, dashboard) as features expand.
All endpoints correctly exclude Mongo _id via projection ({_id:0}) — good.
AI calls have no explicit timeout/retry — single network blip will surface as 502; consider retrying _ask_json once on parse failure.
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is loaded once at import time of agents.py — fine, but if env reloads on hot-reload it won't pick up. Acceptable for MVP.

interview_reply: the candidate-turn count check (>=4) closes the interview but the closing message is hardcoded server-side, bypassing the Interviewer agent — this is by design and matches the playbook.
AuthContext skips checkAuth when hash contains session_id — correct race-fix.
All interactive elements have data-testid coverage matching constants/testIds/app.js.
test_credentials: Seeded via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md. Backend pytest token: test_session_pytest_token (user test-user-pytest). Frontend Playwright token: test_session_frontend_1781944889199.
seed_data_creation: Two test users seeded in mongo: (1) test-user-pytest used by pytest suite (fully onboarded after test run); (2) test-user-frontend-* used by Playwright flow (fully onboarded with completed interview + mentor review). Cleanup query in /app/auth_testing.md step 'Cleanup' will remove all test-* docs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP flows pass on first iteration. Use the seeded session_token 'test_session_pytest_token' (Bearer or cookie) to talk to the backend. AI calls (Gemini/GPT via Emergent LLM key) take 4-15s; use 60-90s timeouts. Frontend uses HttpOnly cookie samesite=none secure=true; in Playwright, inject via context.add_cookies with httpOnly:true, secure:true, sameSite:'None'. To re-test onboarding UI, seed a fresh user with onboarded:false (existing test users are now onboarded).
rca of the issue: No bugs found — first iteration is clean.
